prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中山大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约819名、728名、1017名、737名、603名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，2025年基准位次约603名，为近五 年最优水平；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为37人，2026年增至39人，较2025年小幅扩招约5.4%，扩招对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆情（论文数据存疑等），但2025年周期评价偏正面（报考热情回升），综合来看负面信 号对报考热度有一定压制；抖音热度排名第29位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022–2024年均出现断档信号（中关注），但2025年转为中关注（正 面为主），异常信号趋于减弱；中山大学拥有23个A-及以上学科，其中工商管理、生态学为A+，中国语言文学、数学、物理学、生物学、基础医学等为A，学科 实力极为雄厚，对考生有显著吸引力；中山大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第13名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第11–13名区间，学校层次极高，对高分考生持续具有 强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信等社会热门专业中山大学均有开设且实力强劲，相关专业大类热度持续偏热；海南省2026年高考考生总数约78000人（2025年67408人），增幅约15.7%，竞争显著加剧；中山大学位于广东省广州市 ，与海南省地理位置邻近，气候文化相近，对海南考生有天然的地域吸引力；该校在海南招生计划占比较小（约37–39人），属于省外招生规模适中的985高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招、海南省考生总数大幅增加（+15.7%）以及学校声誉中性偏负面等因素，竞争加剧是主导力量。在2025年基准位次603名基 础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约598名，区间530–666名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制）（不招色盲、色弱）
- 法学
- 汉语言文学（广州）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（深圳）/ 软件工程 / 人工智能 / 智能科学与技术
- 电子信息工程 / 微电子科学与工程（珠海）
- 经济学类（含数字方向）（广州）
- 数学类（珠海）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械工程
- 生物科学类（不招色盲、色弱）
- 环境科学与工程类
- 旅游管理类（数智化方向）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约598名，区间530–666名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如530名以内）可重点冲击临床医学八年制、 法学等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如660名左右）建议以二档的计算机类、电子信息类、数学类等为主，三档专业作为稳妥选择。中山大学学科实力均衡，无论哪个档位 均能获得优质教育资源和就业平台。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sun Yat-sen University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 819, 728, 1017, 737, and 603, showing an overall fluctuating but forward-moving trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 603, the best level in the past five years. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 37 students each year from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 39 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 5.4% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion (e.g., questionable paper data). However, the 2025 cycle evaluation was relatively positive (rebound in application enthusiasm). Overall, negative signals have a certain suppression on application heat. Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with above-average attention on short video platforms. Regarding historical admission anomalies, from 2022 to 2024, there were signs of gaps (medium attention), but in 2025 it turned to medium attention (mainly positive), with anomaly signals weakening. Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Business Administration and Ecology, and A in Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Basic Medicine, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, significantly attracting candidates. Sun Yat-sen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 13th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11th–13th range in recent years. The school level is very high, continuously strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sun Yat-sen University offers socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communications, all with strong strength, and the popularity of related major categories remains persistently high. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is about 78,000 (67,408 in 2025), an increase of about 15.7%, significantly intensifying competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, geographically close to Hainan Province with similar climate and culture, naturally attracting Hainan candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan accounts for a relatively small proportion (about 37–39 students), making it a 985 university with moderate out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province (+15.7%), and the neutral to slightly negative school reputation, intensified competition is the dominant force. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 603, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 598, with a range of 530–666.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) (No color blindness or color weakness)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature (Guangzhou)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Shenzhen) / Software Engineering / Artificial Intelligence / Intelligent Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering / Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Zhuhai)
- Economics (Including Digital Direction) (Guangzhou)
- Mathematics (Zhuhai)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Biological Sciences (No color blindness or color weakness)
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Tourism Management (Digital Intelligence Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 598, with a range of 530–666. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 530) can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Law. Candidates with rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., around 660) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Mathematics, with Tier 3 majors as a stable choice. Sun Yat-sen University has balanced disciplinary strength, and regardless of the tier, candidates can obtain high-quality educational resources and employment platforms.
